benchmarks.metricUsed: Median pre-money valuations by stage: pre-seed $7.7M, seed $15.8M, Series A $46.5M, Series B $133.2M, Series C $307.0M; median deal sizes by stage: $0.5M, $3.8M, $14.0M, $32.4M, $56.5M
Median founding-team ownership after seed 56.2%, after Series A 36.1%, after Series B 23.0%; equal two-person founder splits 45.9% in 2024
benchmarks.benchmarkType: hard benchmark for dilution; contextual reference for cofounder split

benchmarks.metricUsed: 89% of all pre-priced investments were SAFEs; 87% of those SAFEs were post-money; median post-money SAFE over the past year raised $275K at a $10M cap

benchmarks.sourceName: Y Combinator SAFE Financing Documents / Post-Money SAFE Primer
benchmarks.metricUsed: Three post-money SAFE forms for US companies; ownership sold is immediately calculable; example SAFE ownership of $200K/$4M = 5% and $800K/$8M = 10%; liquidity event cash-out versus conversion behavior

benchmarks.sourceName: Carta State of Private Markets: 2025 in Review
benchmarks.metricUsed: Series A AI valuation premium 38%; median dilution from seed through Series C fell from about 18% to 16%; 2025 capital raised totaled $119.5B across 4,859 rounds

benchmarks.sourceName: OECD Venture capital investments in artificial intelligence through 2025
benchmarks.metricUsed: AI made up 61% of global VC investment in 2025; mega deals over $100M accounted for about 73% of AI investment value in 2025
